title: Blue Canyon Comfort Nonslip Bath Mats with Rubber Extensions, Quick Dry Bath Rug with Suction Pads & Drain Holes, Mould Resistant Bathroom Accessory, Durable Bath Rug Runner 65 x 37 cm - Clear
features: 【 DURABLE RUBBER MATERIAL 】: You will definitely appreciate the luxury of standing on the Blue Canyon flexible & comfy bath mat made from Rubber, as it supports your ankles and feet to stand with utmost relief for a more extended period. The Rubber Extension material of this rug is enjoyable on the skin, helps ease the stress on joints, and has a massaging effect.

【 EASY WATER DRAINAGE 】: Our Blue Canyon Rubber bath runner rug comes with hundreds of rubber extensions & drainage holes that allow water to easily flow under the mat and towards the drain, helping to prevent water from sitting stagnant under the mat in your tub & hence prevent mould formation.

【 ANTI-SLIP BACKING 】: Don’t worry about being fractured from dangerous slips and slides while getting out of your bathroom. Our high-performance Bath rug mat stays where you place it, as they come with the backing of suction pads, making it slip-resistant & eliminating the need for constant readjustments, and keeping your loved ones from falling.

【 MULTIPURPOSE USE 】: Our Blue Canyon Comfort luxury floor mats are great for hallways, entryways, family/living rooms, bedrooms, home offices, kitchens, dining rooms, drawing rooms, and anywhere from low traffic to elevated areas of your home. Each Pedestaling makes any room in your home livelier and more comfortable, adding a subtle yet profound accent to any room in your house.

【 FANCIFUL STYLING 】: Make your home decor fun with our vibrant Rubber Bath Mat runners! These Pedestal mat rugs are suitable for most interior designs. Our fanciful styling door mats are available in classic patterns. You can layer them or mix and match them according to your room themes as they are designed keeping in mind the trending interior designing accessories.
